transcript.text:
[Footage from 1 year ago when she was still a rookie]
Hello everyone~
For today
I'm going to eat all-you-can-eat tuna
[Unable to post]
Just to show you how I was that day,
I was seriously like that So I didn't post it
[Chat: Where can I watch it?] I hid it~
[We found it~]
[Rookie Tzuyang]
I'm so happy
It's so good
[More to come soon]
[Undisclosed Tuna Restaurant]
[Please don't over-react this time]
Hello everyone~

I am here at Shinrim Station today
I did a mukbang here when I barely started to do mukbang
I am also a regular here
It's my favorite tuna restaurant
It's so good
I'm here to do mukbang here, but
I'm just here because I want to eat it
[Minam Chamchi]
[Waitlist even on weekdays]
A lot of people came here after she streamed here
Sometimes she eats way too much And sometimes she eats less
She's so good at eating I'm also a fan
This is the best tuna restaurant I've been to
Of course, some of you might know better places
But it's the best one I've been to
This is not a sponsored video

Do I need to order All-You-Can-Eat as 3 people since I eat a lot?
Let's do VIP and the special sushi
[Ready to order]
VIP.. I eat a lot, so
Can I order as 3 people?
It's AYCE, so you can just order as 1 person
I would feel bad then
Then how about as 2 people?
2 VIP AYCE (100,000 Won (~$91.48 USD)) Special Suchi (12 pieces for 25,000 (~$22.87 USD))
If I say that I'm a regular here,
a lot of people will sympathize with the owner
[Chat: Poor owner.. I feel sorry for him!]
That looks good
Yum
[Scooping takes too long]
2 bowls, since I said this was for 2 people

[Drink the rest]
Tasty
What is this?
Stingray
Thank you
This is an eel
Their eels taste good too They melt
How does it taste this good?
Yummy
Thank you
This is the Special Sushi
Bon appetit
That looks good
Soy sauce
Salt
Hurry

I need to eat it
Don't over-react Not today
[Mind-Control]
Slightly dip in the sesame oil
[Clapping is okay]
[Now for the tuna]
[In a rush]
This is the perilla leaf steam
Burdock, and pickled radish
[Checking is she's gone]
[Get outta here]
Bon appetit!
What to eat first?
The one in the middle
Look at that
Dip in the oil and then the soy sauce

Here's a bite
[Happy]
I will just eat for now
That's so good Really
This is like the special part of the tuna
So delicious
I love this part
It's the best
[I am in heaven again]
You mix this up and put it on the tuna
Intestines Looks good
Put it on top like this
I won't say much this mukbang
It's legendary
I'm not exaggerating because I'm streaming
I was like this the last time I was here, right?

I'm like this every time I come here
[The private footage from 2019.01.03]
That looks scrumptious
I'm so happy
That's so good
I'm salivating as I'm chewing
[Rookie version of a food close-up]
How do I do this? Like this?
I need to get the thumbnail
It fell out?
[Rescued]
The floor is not dirty here
And it fell on the ground like this It's okay
[For a better look..]
[Dejavu]
Thank you It's Grilled Chilean Sea Bass

In the soy sauce
I'm really good at eating greasy foods
Foods like tuna and beef intestines
How can this even exist? I'm speechless
It's so good I need a refill
Do you need a refill? Yes
Thank you
[New plate of tuna]
This part is good too
It's almost like steak tartare
Yummy
My favorite part again Thankfully it came out again
Do you guys see the marbling? Isn't it amazing?
This wasn't in the first plate, but it tastes so good
Cube
Tasty

The corn cheese here is on the house
For 55,000 Won and up, it's eel and 55,000 and below, it's corn cheese
It's really good
Everything is good
Big-eyed Tuna tastes good like this Wrapping it in dry seaweed
Like that with white kimchi
I'm not here to stream
I'm here for a meal
Forreals
I struggled so hard last night thinking about this
This part looks really strange
How is it like this?
[Already on her last piece]
[Refill please]
[You already know tho]
Thank you

She's good at eating indeed
Like a group of athletes
There are a lot of people that come here and not eat much
So it somehow balances out
Yes, AYCE businesses struggle if there are a lot of people that can eat like her
It's okay though because some people eat less
[3rd refill]
Flower!
[Tuna flower]
[New start]
Bon appetit
I got it again!
[I thought it was tuna]
Should I try different parts together?
I've never done it before Since we don't play with tuna
3, no 4

Wrap it
4 pieces of tuna
1 bite
I recommend eating them 1 by 1 Since it's wasteful
[Refill please]
[Now for the show]
Dissecting show
Hello
This is the meat near the gills
That looks so delicious
The marbling is amazing
1 bite
How does it taste?
Amazing
How is it this delicious?
Possibly because a handsome man cut it

Well you need a good quality tuna first
The defrosting process is very important as well
We have our own secret method to do so
We take our time to age it too
So customers enjoy it more
Can that cut your finger?
Not if it barely touches you
But if there's enough force, yes
Enjoy your food
Thank you
I'm sure this is what heaven tastes like
And if I take 2 of them
[Finishing up the corn cheese]
[Also the special part]
[Refill please]
[Running out of things to eat]

[Dried Seaweed Mukbang]
Tuna tuna tuna
Come out
You know how you guys give out the soup at the end?
It's coming out right now
Thank you
This is amazing too
This will seriously wash down everything
There are fish roes inside too
[Big bite of the roe]
[Shrimp tempura too]
[Crispy]
[Back to tuna]
He said that this tuna is 1 grade lower than the highest But it's amazing
[So refill 1 more time]
[Embarrassed]

You can eat more!
You can eat as much as you want
Thank you
2 of each people it's for 2 people
[Back to Mukbang]
[Precious plate of tuna]
[Clearing the rice]
[And the rest of the tuna]
[Cleared once again]
I will stop here
Thanks everyone~
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
